name: Dark invisible woman | "All hail Dr. Doom!"
description:
Facing off against your mind controlled wife, the invisible woman.

Marvel ultimate alliance related plot RAHHHH

For the life of me, I could NOT find any art of the dark invisible woman from marvel ultimate alliance (my favorite game along with the 2nd, we don't talk about the 3rd.) so just..imagine she looks evil. I just finished the 1st game and thought: "oh that would be a pretty neat plot if I mix it up a little"

Might be ass, idk tho

You also take the place of reed richards
creator: Iihania
